title: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
summary_full: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.
summary_public: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.
